outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: uses the target language to share information

outcomes.name: Responding
outcomes.description: locates and responds to key words and information in texts

outcomes.name: Composing
outcomes.description: composes texts in the target language using familiar words and expressions

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: recognises how terms and expressions reflect aspects of culture

outcomes.name: Language awareness and building
outcomes.description: recognises ways of maintaining, reviving and strengthening Aboriginal Languages

outcomes.name: Interacting in Auslan
outcomes.description: exchanges meaning and information in guided interactions using familiar signs and common protocols

outcomes.name: Understanding texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: identifies key information and some details in simple texts and responds in Auslan and/or English

outcomes.name: Creating texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: creates simple informative and imaginative texts on known topics using familiar language

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: identifies connections between language, culture and identity

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: identifies and responds to information to demonstrate understanding of texts with familiar vocabulary and language

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: translates modelled vocabulary and phrases into English

outcomes.name: Intercultural understanding
outcomes.description: compares aspects of the target language and culture, and their own language(s) and culture(s)

outcomes.name: Dance
outcomes.description: composes and performs dance to communicate ideas to an audience, and describes ways the elements of dance are used to convey ideas through movement

outcomes.name: Drama
outcomes.description: makes and performs drama to embody and enact characters, ideas and stories for an audience, and describes ways the dramatic elements are used to convey meaning

outcomes.name: Music
outcomes.description: performs, uses listening skills and composes to communicate musical ideas, and describes ways the elements of music are used to convey musical ideas

outcomes.name: Visual Arts
outcomes.description: makes artworks using art forms to represent subject matter and ideas, and describes ways artists convey ideas about their world to audiences through artworks

outcomes.name: Oral language and communication
outcomes.description: communicates with familiar audiences for social and learning purposes, by interacting, understanding and presenting

outcomes.name: Vocabulary
outcomes.description: builds knowledge and use of Tier 1, Tier 2 and Tier 3 vocabulary through interacting, wide reading and writing, and by defining and analysing words

outcomes.name: Reading fluency
outcomes.description: sustains independent reading with accuracy, automaticity, rate and prosody suited to purpose, audience and meaning

outcomes.name: Reading comprehension
outcomes.description: reads and comprehends texts for wide purposes using knowledge of text structures and language, and by monitoring comprehension

outcomes.name: Creating written texts (imaginative)
outcomes.description: plans, creates and revises written texts for imaginative purposes, using text features, sentence-level grammar, punctuation and word-level language for a target audience

outcomes.name: Creating written texts (informative)
outcomes.description: plans, creates and revises written texts for informative purposes, using text features, sentence-level grammar, punctuation and word-level language for a target audience

outcomes.name: Creating written texts (persuasive)
outcomes.description: plans, creates and revises written texts for persuasive purposes, using text features, sentence-level grammar, punctuation and word-level language for a target audience

outcomes.name: Spelling
outcomes.description: selects, applies and describes appropriate phonological, orthographic and morphological generalisations and strategies when spelling in a range of contexts

outcomes.name: Handwriting
outcomes.description: forms legible joined letters to develop handwriting fluency

outcomes.name: Digital transcription
outcomes.description: uses digital technologies to create texts

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to literature
outcomes.description: identifies and describes how ideas are represented in literature and strategically uses similar representations when creating texts

subjects.name: Human Society and its Environment
subjects.description: Learning area for Human Society and its Environment

outcomes.name: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander histories and cultures
outcomes.description: describes Aboriginal Peoples’ obligations to Country, Culture and Community

outcomes.name: Geography
outcomes.description: explains how people care for Australia’s environments and participate in Australian society, using geographical information

outcomes.name: History
outcomes.description: explains how people lived in the past, how navigation connected the world, and what life was like in the Sydney Cove penal settlement, using sources as evidence

outcomes.name: Working mathematically
outcomes.description: develops understanding and fluency in mathematics through exploring and connecting mathematical concepts, choosing and applying mathematical techniques to solve problems, and communicating their thinking and reasoning coherently and clearly

outcomes.name: Representing numbers
outcomes.description: applies an understanding of place value and the role of zero to represent numbers to at least tens of thousands

outcomes.name: Representing numbers
outcomes.description: represents and compares decimals up to 2 decimal places using place value

outcomes.name: Additive relations
outcomes.description: selects and uses mental and written strategies for addition and subtraction involving 2- and 3-digit numbers

outcomes.name: Additive relations
outcomes.description: completes number sentences involving addition and subtraction by finding missing values

outcomes.name: Multiplicative relations
outcomes.description: represents and uses the structure of multiplicative relations to 10 × 10 to solve problems

outcomes.name: Multiplicative relations
outcomes.description: completes number sentences involving multiplication and division by finding missing values

outcomes.name: Fractions
outcomes.description: represents and compares halves, quarters, thirds and fifths as lengths on a number line and their related fractions formed by halving (eighths, sixths and tenths)

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: uses grid maps and directional language to locate positions and follow routes

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: measures and estimates lengths in metres, centimetres and millimetres

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: identifies angles and classifies them by comparing to a right angle

outcomes.name: Two-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: compares two-dimensional shapes and describes their features

outcomes.name: Two-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: performs transformations by combining and splitting two-dimensional shapes

outcomes.name: Two-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: estimates, measures and compares areas using square centimetres and square metres

outcomes.name: Three-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: makes and sketches models and nets of three-dimensional objects including prisms and pyramids

outcomes.name: Three-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: estimates, measures and compares capacities (internal volumes) using litres, millilitres and volumes using cubic centimetres

outcomes.name: Non-spatial measure
outcomes.description: estimates, measures and compares the masses of objects using kilograms and grams

outcomes.name: Non-spatial measure
outcomes.description: represents and interprets analog and digital time in hours, minutes and seconds

outcomes.name: Data
outcomes.description: collects discrete data and constructs graphs using a given scale

outcomes.name: Data
outcomes.description: interprets data in tables, dot plots and column graphs

outcomes.name: Chance
outcomes.description: records and compares the results of chance experiments

outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: exchanges information in familiar contexts by selecting culturally appropriate modelled language

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: identifies and responds to information in texts to demonstrate understanding

outcomes.name: Creating texts
outcomes.description: creates texts for familiar communicative purposes by selecting culturally appropriate modelled language

subjects.name: Personal Development, Health and Physical Education
subjects.description: Learning area for Personal Development, Health and Physical Education

outcomes.name: Movement skill and physical activity
outcomes.description: applies movement skills, strategies and teamwork in physical activities

outcomes.name: Respectful relationships and safety
outcomes.description: describes and applies skills and strategies to strengthen respectful relationships

outcomes.name: Respectful relationships and safety
outcomes.description: describes and applies skills and strategies to interact safely in offline and online contexts

outcomes.name: Identity, health and wellbeing
outcomes.description: explains how related factors influence identity, health and wellbeing

outcomes.name: Self-management and interpersonal skills
outcomes.description: explains and applies self-management and interpersonal skills in a range of contexts

subjects.name: Science and Technology
subjects.description: Learning area for Science and Technology

outcomes.name: Science
outcomes.description: uses information to investigate the solar system and the effects of energy on living, physical and geological systems

outcomes.name: Planning and conducting investigations
outcomes.description: poses questions to create fair tests that investigate the effects of energy on living things and physical systems

outcomes.name: Data
outcomes.description: uses and interprets data to describe patterns and relationships

outcomes.name: Design and digital technologies
outcomes.description: uses a design process to create products to address user needs or opportunities

outcomes.name: Design and digital technologies
outcomes.description: designs and uses algorithms, represents data and uses digital systems for a purpose
